criteria.evidence: tools/axxon_mcp_recognizer_write.py:157-174 defines recognizer_change_lists_stream(added=None, changed=None, removed_ids=None, confirmation=""); calls self._gate first (164-166) before any wire call; returns {status:error} with no wire call when all payloads empty (168-169); reuses _gate, _build_list (via _list_packets) and _stub_and_pb2 without duplication. Tests test_disabled_without_approval/test_rejects_bad_confirmation/test_no_edit_errors_without_wire_call assert empty client.calls.

_list_packets (143-155) yields one ChangeListsStreamRequest per added_list / changed_list plus one removed_lists=ChangeListsStreamRequest.ListIds(ids=[...]) packet; sets status=EPS_LAST only on the final packet; method drains response stream collecting failed_lists (171-174) and returns {status:applied, failed_lists:[...]}. test_packet_sequence_and_last_status asserts 3-packet sequence, oneof fields, EPS_LAST only on last.

tools/axxon_mcp_server.py:931-939 registers @server.tool recognizer_change_lists_stream inside register_recognizer_write_tools; no new flag/param. RECOGNIZER_WRITE_TOOL_NAMES (module lines 34-40) includes 'recognizer_change_lists_stream'.
5 new ChangeListsStreamTests (disabled, bad-confirmation, no-edit, packet-sequence, failed-lists-passthrough) all OK; full suite 786 tests OK on rerun.

api_methods.json: RealtimeRecognizerService ChangeListsStream live_status=tested-pass; all 7 non-fixture recognizer methods tested-pass with GetData=tested-warn-fixture-needed.
